description: Scalable backend systems, secure authentication, and optimized data access with Postgres and App Router.
best_practices: Use Next.js 15+ App Router and React Server Components for seamless data fetching.
Implement Row Level Security (RLS) on all database tables (PostgreSQL/Supabase).
Enable passwordless and OAuth authentication through Better Auth or Clerk.
Optimize SQL queries and indexing to minimize latency; use Prisma or Drizzle ORM.
Secure APIs with proper middleware, rate limiting, and input sanitization.
Model data for scalability and relational integrity.
Implement real-time features using WebSockets or Supabase Realtime.

security_rules.rls_enabled: Always enable RLS for production data.
security_rules.input_validation: Use Zod for rigorous input validation on both client and server.
